name: security_audit

issues.description: Admin endpoint GET /api/feedback/admin/ correctly uses get_current_admin_user dependency
Admin endpoint GET /api/feedback/admin/{feedback_id} correctly uses get_current_admin_user
Admin endpoint POST /api/feedback/admin/{feedback_id}/respond correctly uses get_current_admin_user
Admin endpoint PATCH /api/feedback/admin/{feedback_id}/status correctly uses get_current_admin_user
issues.impact: PROTECTED - only admins can change status

issues.description: Admin endpoint GET /api/disputes/admin/disputes correctly uses get_current_admin_user
Admin endpoint POST /api/disputes/admin/disputes/{dispute_id}/resolve correctly uses get_current_admin_user
Admin endpoint GET /api/admin/users uses AdminUser dependency (= get_current_admin_user)
issues.impact: PROTECTED - only admins can access user list

issues.description: Admin endpoint GET /api/admin/users/{user_id} uses AdminUser dependency
issues.impact: PROTECTED - only admins can access user details

issues.description: Endpoint GET /api/channels/stats is intentionally public - documented as 'Доступна БЕЗ авторизации'
issues.impact: INTENTIONAL - public API for channel statistics
INTENTIONAL - public API for subcategory statistics

issues.description: Endpoint GET /api/billing/plans without CurrentUser - acceptable for public pricing
issues.impact: Low - pricing information is typically public

issues.description: Webhook endpoint without CurrentUser - acceptable but needs signature verification
issues.impact: Must verify YooKassa webhook signature to prevent fake notifications

issues.description: Endpoint GET /api/analytics/stats/public without CurrentUser - acceptable for public stats
Auth endpoint without CurrentUser - acceptable for login
Owner check is correctly implemented - raises 403 if not owner

notes: VERIFIED: 4 admin endpoints in feedback.py PROTECTED with get_current_admin_user dependency
VERIFIED: 2 admin endpoints in disputes.py PROTECTED with get_current_admin_user dependency
VERIFIED: 2 admin endpoints in admin.py PROTECTED with AdminUser dependency
VERIFIED: 2 channels.py stats endpoints are intentionally PUBLIC (documented)
No SQL injection risks found - all queries use SQLAlchemy ORM or text() with parameters
No hardcoded secrets found - credentials loaded from environment via settings
No sensitive data logging found - passwords/tokens not logged
Owner checks in placements.py are correctly implemented
Webhook endpoint needs signature verification for YooKassa callbacks
